title: Senior Doctor - Max Healthcare International Enterprises - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Max Healthcare International Enterprises - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at Max Healthcare International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Noida. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Max Healthcare International Enterprises:
Max Healthcare International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Healthcare International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
